violations.text: Ready to eat bakery items packaged in plastic were observed stored in old egg carton boxes. Per PIC, establishment receives the bakery items in boxes from the supplier and stores them in original boxes until needed for sale on display shelves. PIC is to ask supplier to refrain from shipping bakery items in egg carton boxes. Food items were removed from boxes during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by dead carcasses on glue traps. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to work with pest control to control pest activity. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of front window display and behind shelving in bread aisle were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Areas shall be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2023
